name: @pedrofariasx/toolstream
description: Incremental streaming parser for LLM tool calls — framework-agnostic, event-driven, multi-provider

mainClass.name: ToolStream
mainClass.description: Main streaming parser class. Extends ToolStreamEmitter for event-driven parsing.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Feed a chunk of text into the parser. Returns this for chaining.

methods.name: finalize
methods.description: Signal end of stream, complete all pending calls, drain events.

methods.name: on
methods.signature: on<E extends EventKind>(event: E, listener: ToolStreamListener<E>): this
methods.description: Register an event listener. Inherited from ToolStreamEmitter.

methods.name: getPendingCalls
methods.description: Get all currently pending (incomplete) tool calls.

methods.name: snapshot
methods.description: Get a snapshot of the current parser state.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Reset the parser to its initial state.

methods.name: setCustomAdapter
methods.description: Register and activate a custom provider adapter.

methods.name: getProvider
methods.description: Get the currently detected/set provider name.

properties.name: autoDetectProvider
properties.description: Automatically detect the provider format from chunks

properties.name: provider
properties.description: Explicit provider name (used when autoDetectProvider is false)

properties.name: earlyExecutionThreshold
properties.description: Confidence threshold for early execution events (0.0 to 1.0)

properties.name: maxBufferSize
properties.description: Maximum internal buffer size in bytes

events.name: text
events.description: Emitted for plain text chunks (non-tool-call content)

events.name: token
events.description: Emitted for each token during tokenization

events.name: toolDetected
events.description: A new tool call has been detected in the stream

events.name: toolStarted
events.signature: (id: string, name: string, index: number) => void
events.description: A tool call has started (name identified)

events.name: toolUpdated
events.description: A pending tool call has been updated with new data

events.name: argumentsUpdated
events.signature: (delta: string, partial: Record<string, unknown>, index: number) => void
events.description: Arguments delta received and partial object parsed

events.name: jsonUpdated
events.description: JSON arguments have been partially parsed

events.name: repair
events.signature: (original: string, repaired: string, index: number | undefined) => void
events.description: JSON repair was performed on malformed arguments

events.name: normalized
events.description: A tool call has been normalized to the standard format

events.name: toolCompleted
events.description: A tool call has been fully parsed and completed

events.name: drain
events.description: All events have been drained after finalize

providers.name: openai
providers.description: OpenAI streaming tool calls (SSE delta format)

providers.name: markdown
providers.description: Markdown fenced code blocks with tool definitions

types.ProviderName: openai | anthropic | gemini | deepseek | qwen | xml | markdown | custom
types.StateMachineState: Idle | Text | PossibleTool | ToolName | Arguments | Json | Escape | Completed | Error
types.TokenType: OBJECT_START | OBJECT_END | ARRAY_START | ARRAY_END | STRING | NUMBER | TRUE | FALSE | NULL | COLON | COMMA | IDENTIFIER | TAG_OPEN | TAG_CLOSE | TAG_SELF_CLOSE | TAG_NAME | TEXT | EOF | INVALID
